category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes fdupes as duplicate file detection/deletion software.
source_facts.description says fdupes identifies or deletes duplicate files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use `fdupes`.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the upstream documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/adrianlopezroche/fdupes; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
